forbids: executable TypeScript/JavaScript managing code or source/vendor topology inside authored Habitat artifacts
why: Habitat artifacts are repository blueprints: rules, patterns, and baselines describe enforceable structure while implementation code lives in the owning Habitat domain, provider, or adapter.
remediate: Move executable code into the owning Habitat source module and keep .habitat entries as declarative rule metadata, pattern text, or baseline data.
message: Habitat authored artifacts must stay declarative.
